brain: AP HK - General Press and media

stakeholders.Canonical Name: Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau
stakeholders.Role: Provides financial oversight and manages public finances

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 根據財經事務及庫務局的最新資料，政府公共財政儲備已由2019⾄20年財政年度11709億元輾轉下降至2023⾄24財政年度的約7700億元（不包括綠債收入）...
Source metadata.evidence_translated: According to the latest data from the Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau, the government’s public financial reserves have decreased from HKD 1,171 billion in the 2019-20 fiscal year to about HKD 770 billion in the 2023-24 fiscal year (excluding green bond income)...

stakeholders.Role: Oversees labour market conditions and welfare programs

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 勞⼯及福利局局長孫⽟菡表示，在勞⼯需求受經濟繼續增長所⽀持下，勞⼯市場短期內料會維持緊絀...
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Secretary for Labour and Welfare, Sun Yuhan, stated that with labour demand supported by continued economic growth, the labour market is expected to remain tight in the short term...

stakeholders.Role: Provides statistical data regarding population and employment

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 政府統計處今⽇（20⽇）公布最新數據，2023年年底⼈⼝數字為7,503,100...
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Census and Statistics Department announced today (20th) the latest data showing that the population figure at the end of 2023 is 7,503,100...

stakeholders.Role: Provides news and opinions on socio-economic issues

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 作者關焯照是冠域商業及經濟研究中⼼主任。內容僅代表作者個⼈觀點，不代表香港01立場...
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The author, Kwan Cheuk Chiu, is the director of the Center for Business and Economic Research. The content only represents the author's personal views and does not reflect the stance of HK01...

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 老⼈選擇居住地時，安老和健康護理是重要的考慮因素。香港⽬前⾯對護理員短缺、租⾦昂
Source metadata.evidence_translated: When the elderly choose a place to live, elderly care and health care are important considerations. Hong Kong currently faces a shortage of caregivers and high rents.

stakeholders.Role: Implements policies regarding public housing and migration to the Greater Bay Area

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 例如香港政府⾃去年12⽉實施⼀系列「搶夜經濟不振，其中⼀個經常被提出的解釋是⾏為模式改變；
Source metadata.evidence_translated: For example, the Hong Kong government has implemented a series of measures since December last year to stimulate the night economy, one of the common explanations being a change in behavior patterns.

stakeholders.Role: A region proposed for elderly residents to migrate to, to alleviate housing shortages in Hong Kong

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 騰出寶貴的公屋位置給年輕⼈及年輕家庭落地⽣根，好好打分。可設「銀髮邨」
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Free up valuable public housing locations for young people and young families to settle down, it's beneficial. A 'Silver Hair Village' could be established.

stakeholders.Role: Provides advice on elderly services in Hong Kong

Source metadata.filename: 2024_Bay Area Development Promotes Industrial Opportunities for Hong Kong-Style Elderly Care.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 张建韬告诉⼤公报，恢复通关后便⼀直忙碌不停。在市场准⼊、⼟地供应、税费减免、财政补贴、购买服务等⽅⾯，⽴⽴有新进展.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Zhang Jiantao told the newspaper that after the resumption of customs clearance, he has been very busy. There have been new developments in areas such as market access, land supply, tax reductions, financial subsidies, and purchasing services.

stakeholders.Role: Promotes the elderly service industry and coordinates with Hong Kong providers

Source metadata.filename: 2024_Bay Area Development Promotes Industrial Opportunities for Hong Kong-Style Elderly Care.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 粤港澳⼤湾区建设进⼊五周年，到⼴东跨境养⽼成为不少⾹港⻓者的新选项.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: As the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area construction enters its fifth anniversary, cross-border elderly care in Guangdong has become a new option for many Hong Kong residents.

stakeholders.Role: Director General of Hong Kong Advisory Committee on Elderly Services and Managing Director of Hong Kong Elderly Welfare Management and Health Services Ltd.

Source metadata.filename: 2024_Bay Area Development Promotes Industrial Opportunities for Hong Kong-Style Elderly Care.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 张建韬说，以空间为例，⾹者供图；右图：内地⼀家养⽼院内，志愿者和⽼⼈⼀起包饺⼦.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Zhang Jiantao mentioned that, for example in terms of space, the local institutions are presented; in the adjacent image: a home for the elderly in the mainland, where volunteers and elderly people are making dumplings together.
